title: Static Files and Custom 404
description: Serve static files and add a 404 handler.
problemStatement:
Create an Express app that:
- Serves static files from a directory named `public`. In that directory, create an `index.html` with a simple welcome message and a `style.css` that styles the page.
- Has a route `GET /about` that sends 'About Us'.
- Any other route should return a 404 page with the message '404 - Page Not Found' (as plain text or HTML).

Make sure the static files are accessible (e.g., `/style.css` should serve the CSS).
hints:
Use `app.use(express.static('public'))`.
Place the 404 handler after all routes.
expectedOutput: Home page from index.html, about page, and 404 for other paths.
